artifacts.rtl_code:
module down_timer(input logic clk, rst_n, start, input logic [7:0] cycles, output logic done);
  logic [7:0] remaining; logic running;
  always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin remaining <= 8'd0; running <= 1'b0; done <= 1'b0; end
    else if (start) begin remaining <= cycles; running <= 1'b1; done <= 1'b0; end
    else if (running) begin
      remaining <= remaining - 8'd1;
      if (remaining == 8'd1) begin done <= 1'b1; running <= 1'b0; end
    end
  end
endmodule

assumptions: The artifact is synthetic and limited to the behavior shown; no unstated tool result is assumed.

issue_summary.issue: Starting with cycles equal to zero loads zero, then decrements it to 8'hff before done can assert.

evidence.reason: done is tested only in the running branch and remaining <= remaining - 1 executes for remaining == 0.

time_reasoning.clock_cycle_behavior: The zero-duration policy determines whether done asserts on start or the following clock.
time_reasoning.latency_or_state_risk: Do not add latency, state, or interface changes without specification confirmation.
time_reasoning.reset_behavior_risk: Preserve every explicit reset value and post-reset transition.

module sticky_timer(input logic clk, rst_n, start, input logic [7:0] limit, output logic done);
  logic [7:0] count;
  always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin count <= 8'd0; done <= 1'b0; end
    else if (start) begin count <= 8'd0; done <= 1'b0; end
    else if (!done) begin count <= count + 8'd1; if (count == limit) done <= 1'b1; end
  end
endmodule
